fs-idm343484288.latex: \begin{aligned} \text{Decomposition of zinc sulfide:} \, \text{ZnS}(s)→\text{Zn}(s)+\text{S}(s)\, \text{Δ}{G}_{1}^{^{\circ}}=201.3\, \text{kJ} \\ \text{Formation of hydrogen sulfide:}\, \text{S}(s)+{\text{H}}_{2}(g)→{\text{H}}_{\text{2}}\text{S}(g)\, \text{Δ}{G}_{2}^{^{\circ}}=-33.4\, \text{kJ} \\ \text{Coupled reaction:}\, \text{ZnS}(s)+{\text{H}}_{2}(g)→\text{Zn}(s)+{\text{H}}_{\text{2}}\text{S}(g)\, \text{Δ}G\text{°}=201.3\, \text{kJ}+-33.4\, \text{kJ}=167.9\, \text{kJ} \end{aligned}
